description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fedora:latest Docker image and defines a single stage called build_and_test. Add a job named build_script in the build_and_test stage that executes the following shell commands in order: dnf update -y, dnf install automake -y, dnf install make -y, dnf install texinfo -y, dnf install java-1.8.0-openjdk-devel -y, dnf install git -y, dnf install ant -y, dnf install gcc -y, ./buildKawa, cd Kawa-git, and make check. The job does not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules, so it runs on every pipeline execution. No services or deployment targets are required.
